# Conversion Output Template

## Conversion Summary
- **Source**: [source_file_path_or_description]
- **Target Format**: [target_format]
- **Output Location**: [output_path_or_base64_indicator]
- **Conversion Time**: [duration_seconds] seconds
- **Status**: [SUCCESS/FAILED/PARTIAL]

## File Details
- **Original Size**: [original_size_bytes] bytes
- **Output Size**: [output_size_bytes] bytes
- **Compression Ratio**: [ratio_percentage]%
- **Quality Settings**: [quality_parameters]

## Validation Results
- **Format Valid**: [YES/NO]
- **Content Integrity**: [VERIFIED/ISSUES_FOUND]
- **Playback Test**: [PASSED/FAILED] (if applicable)
- **OCR Accuracy**: [percentage]% (if applicable)

## Issues and Warnings
- [List any issues encountered]
- [Performance notes]
- [Compatibility warnings]

## Recommendations
- [Suggested optimizations]
- [Alternative approaches]
- [Future improvements]
